coauthor.title: Git Co-authoring
coauthor.description: Choose which identity to use for repository actions.
coauthor.as_you_desc: The bot will use your personal identity for commits, branches, and pull requests, giving you full credit for the changes.
coauthor.as_you_fallback: Automatically falls back to the bot if personal permissions are insufficient to ensure tasks are completed.
coauthor.as_bot_desc: All repository actions will be attributed to the system bot. This ensures a consistent audit trail and is the recommended setting for automated workflows.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose your preferred language for the interface. Changes apply immediately.
language.label: Interface language

newsletter.description: We'll send occasional emails about new features, updates, and offers. You can unsubscribe at any time.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Warning: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove all your data from our servers.
delete.reason_title: What's the main reason you're deleting your account?

reasons.complex: Too complex or hard to use

feedback.demo_disabled: Delete account is disabled in demo mode.

sitepins_ai.title: Sitepins AI
sitepins_ai.description: Configure your AI provider to enable intelligent content suggestions and autocomplete features.
sitepins_ai.security1: We **do not store your API key** in our database to ensure your privacy and comply with security policies.
sitepins_ai.security2: Your key is stored locally in your browser only. If you switch or clear your browser, the key will be lost.
sitepins_ai.security3: Please keep your API key secure and accessible to yourself, as we cannot recover it for you.

archived_project.title: Project archived
archived_project.description: This project has been archived and most functionality is disabled. You can still access project settings to restore or change the project status.
